label: Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers

node.label: Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers
node.definition: Numerical solvers are embedded in trainable computation graphs so physical or latent dynamics can be learned end to end.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers is to connect Numerical analysis, Differential equations to downstream capabilities including Normalizing, rectified & flow-matching models, Neural ODEs, CDEs & SDEs, Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs.
examples: substrate for Normalizing, rectified & flow-matching models
substrate for Neural ODEs, CDEs & SDEs
substrate for Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Numerical analysis, Differential equations.

dependencies.rationale: Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers uses Numerical analysis as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers uses Differential equations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers uses Calculus & automatic differentiation theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: Numerical solvers are embedded in trainable computation graphs so physical or latent dynamics can be learned end to end.
